summary: Completed favicon implementation testing for multi-domain language training platform. Favicon file is correctly served and referenced, but dynamic favicon script doesn't handle preview domain correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Script doesn't handle preview domain 'launch-finalize-1.preview.emergentagent.com' - falls back to default favicon-advance.png instead of favicon-avance-langue.ico
Playwright script encountered 'str' object is not callable error when testing navigation links

passed_tests: index.html correctly references favicon-avance-langue.ico in default tags
Site loads properly with Advance Language content
Language switcher FR button is present and clickable
All favicon files are accessible (advance.ico, advance.png, avance-langue.ico)
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating dynamic favicon script to handle preview/staging domains or add a condition for *.preview.emergentagent.com domains to use the advancelanguage logic. This is minor since it only affects the preview environment.
